title: Standard Operating Procedure: Masson Trichrome Staining on Rat Femur Sections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"hfmcq","text":"To perform Masson Trichrome staining on rat femur sections for differentiation of mineralized bone, demineralized bone, collagen, muscle fibers, and nuclei.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"3jzlg","text":"Preparation of Solutions","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2fvpt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wb5xq","text":"Bouin’s solution: Mix 750 mL picric acid solution, 250 mL formaldehyde solution, and 50 mL acetic acid.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fnxox","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bgsop","text":"Weigert-Lillie’s Iron Hematoxylin: Prepare Solution A by dissolving 15 g FeCl3·6H2O, 27 g FeSO4·7H2O, in 1788 mL distilled water and 12 mL HCl. Prepare Solution B by dissolving hematoxylin monohydrate (10 g) in 1000 mL ethanol. For staining, mix 150 mL of Solution A with 50 mL of Solution B, filter, and use within 5 days.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":35},{"style":"bold","offset":43,"length":10},{"style":"bold","offset":152,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xvjw4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"g3hu0","text":"Biebrich Scarlet/Fuchsin Acid: Dissolve 4.5 g Biebrich Scarlet and 0.5 g Fuchsin Acid in 500 mL distilled water with 5 mL acetic acid, stir and filter.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":30}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qhwo6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fpurp","text":"Molybdotungstophosphoric/Tungstophosphoric Acid: Dissolve 25 g of Molybdotungstophosphoric acid hydrate and 25 g of Tungstophosphoric acid hydrate.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":48}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n0lbd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6yj26","text":"2% Aniline Blue: Dissolve Aniline Blue (20 g) in 1000 mL distilled water with 20 mL acetic acid, stir with heat and filter.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"nk1dy","text":"Contains picric acid and formaldehyde. Toxic if inhaled, ingested, or in contact with skin. Irritates eyes, respiratory tract, and skin. Use protective clothing, gloves, and work under ventilation. In case of eye contact, rinse immediately and seek medical attention.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"uhgdl","text":"Bouin’s solution components:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2rvh0","text":"- Picric acid (84512.260, VWR Chemicals; 12 g/L aqueous solution, 750 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kxos2","text":"- Formaldehyde solution (15512-1L-R, Sigma-Aldrich; 250 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fzger","text":"- Acetic acid (2234.1000, Chem Solute; 50 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kl0iv","text":"Weigert-Lillie’s Iron Hematoxylin:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"szaym","text":"- FeCl3·6H2O (1.03943.0250, Merck; 15 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e4gtr","text":"- FeSO4·7H2O (1.03965.0500, Merck; 27 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ilwhl","text":"- Hydrochloric acid (20252.290, VWR Chemicals; 12 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vjnku","text":"- Hematoxylin monohydrate (1.15938.0100, Merck; 10 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2aphf","text":"- Ethanol 99% (1000 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fr6ze","text":"Biebrich Scarlet/Fuchsin Acid:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"h5dgb","text":"- Biebrich Scarlet (1A-398, Waldeck; 4.5 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mrj03","text":"- Fuchsin Acid (1.05231.0025, Merck; 0.5 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sugwk","text":"- Acetic acid (2234.1000, Chem Solute; 5 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ugn2i","text":"Molybdotungstophosphoric Acid:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"urdia","text":"- Molybdotungstophosphoric acid hydrate (1.00532.0100, Merck; 25 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dicio","text":"- Tungstophosphoric acid hydrate (1.00583.0250, Merck; 25 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wl5mt","text":"2% Aniline Blue:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1rolt","text":"- Aniline Blue (21999.183, VWR; 20 g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ykxkk","text":"- Acetic acid (2234.1000, Chem Solute; 20 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Bouin’s solution: Preheat and incubate at 60 °C in fume hood.
creator: Birgitte Villadsen
